Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-26 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Daily Output Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong short-term momentum leaders. MAMA ranks #1 with a composite score of 94.6, driven by consistent ratio progression (4 of 5 ratio passes) and flawless SMA positioning across all timeframes; notably, it gained 147.39% over one year while outperforming SPY by 127.32% and maintaining a "clean" momentum signal despite 1.797x elevated volatility. ADTTF follows with extreme absolute returns—278.28% one-year gain with 40.58% weekly returns—but shows a critical weakness: only 3 ratio passes due to a sharp 0.58x ratio from 1-week to 1-month returns, suggesting the recent rally may be outpacing its underlying trend consistency. Both assets clear all SMA gates and significantly outpace major indices (SPY, QQQ, IAU), but MAMA's higher ratio consistency score (97.9 vs. an implied lower figure for ADTTF) indicates more sustainable momentum architecture, while ADTTF's bad_spy_score of 4.99 versus MAMA's 2.13 suggests ADTTF carries higher drawdown risk on market reversals.
